event_blocks.summary: Hands with light purple nail polish and a light gray sweater hold a white ceramic palette decorated with pink flowers and green leaves, set to melancholic piano music. Pink ceramic powder is poured from a glass jar into the ceramic palette, which has a green leaf design. The hands open a wooden drawer containing ceramic tools like loop tools and a metal scraper, placing them on a wooden board with clinking and scraping sounds. The warm-toned wooden workspace, featuring background ceramic pieces and tools, is well-lit and organized. Hands handle sealed plastic bags of pink, green, and blue ceramic powders, creating rustling sounds as they are placed on a gray cutting mat. The powders are poured into glass jars: pink, then green, then blue, with gentle pouring sounds. On-screen text states, 'In this video, I wanted to show you the steps of my ceramic products that I made for myself,' and 'I will not be including detailed technical information because I am not a professional in this field.'
